title: Gsuite Workspace App
excerpt:
Request you to build a Gmail Plugin so that we can add Emails to Monday.com within Gmail. 
This is a very important feature for Gmail Management

posts.author: PulkitBachhawat (Pulkit Bachhawat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Request you to build a Gmail Plugin so that we can add Emails to Monday.com within Gmail.

This is a very important feature for Gmail Management

posts.author: paulronolo (Paul)
posts.cookedHtml:
@PulkitBachhawat

Do you just need to add emails to a board in Monday?
If so, you can use the “Create items via Email” function. https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/115005339645-Email-to-board

Save the generated email address into your contacts and forward your emails to that email address and you’ll have your item in created in Monday. If you need to change column values at the same time, you can make use of Make/Zapier.
